name: Price Elliott
description:
Hello this is my first bot!

Please give me feedback good and bad so i know how to improve!

Art is not mine but i dont know who the artist is..

i also tried to leave the first message open ended to allow more freedom so go nuts and play any role you like.

As far as i am aware the chat works fine with any role because i have tested it myself and seems okay ŵith roles even as a thief, assassin, butler, another royal, realky anything.. So dont be shy to use any pov you wish✨️

I wouldnt mind seeing chats either since i love to see what you might come up with :]
creator: Poncho_312548
